name: Sweet Italian Hot Sausage (Grdg72b)
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a mortar and pestle or your blender, make a powder out of the fennel seeds, corrinder seeds, dried parsley, salt, minced garlic, and pepper.
2. Add the spice mixture to the ground pork and lightly mix together using your hands.
3. Shape the meat into a loaf and use within two days. You can make larger portions if desired.
4. Divide into pound portions, wrap each portion in plastic wrap, then in freezer foil.
5. Store in the freezer and use within three months.
